title: zentinel pipeline escalation record v1
description: A record that an active task escalated to deeper review, a prerequisite task, or a user decision. Carries the complexity class, final outcome, and monotonic required-gate evidence.

schema_version.description: Pinned schema identity for this artifact.

trigger.description: The escalation trigger (for example survivor_after_retry_limit, compiler_internal_risk, public_contract_ambiguity).

evidence.description: Paths or references proving the trigger fired.

required_decision.description: The decision the escalation needs (for example architecture_review).

recommended_autonomous_action.description: The action the agent recommends taking without a human when the user_input boundary is not reached.

user_input_required.description: True only when the escalation requires an explicit user decision.

required_gates.description: The gates required for the task_class. Monotonic: a higher class must include every gate of every lower class.

required_reviewers.description: The reviewers required for the task_class (for example Architecture Reviewer and Property Test Agent for compiler_internal).
